---
title: "Contact"
---

## Contact

If you would like to get in touch, please use the details below.

::: {.section-card}
- **Email:** samhineme128@gmail.com  
- **GitHub:** [serena-128](https://github.com/serena-128)  
- **LinkedIn:** [Your LinkedIn Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/serenae-1)
:::

## References

References are available upon request.

::: {.callout-tip}
Thank you for taking the time to view my portfolio.
:::
